options.content: **Sprint Detail** — Per-sprint drill-down for Scrum Masters and Release Managers. Select a team and sprint to see scope, readiness, delivery and QASE test coverage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.name AS "Sprint", INITCAP(s.state) AS "State",
  TO_CHAR(s.start_date,    'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Start",
  TO_CHAR(s.end_date,      'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "End",
  TO_CHAR(s.complete_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Completed"
FROM sprints s WHERE s.id = $sprint::bigint

SELECT COALESCE(s.goal, '— No sprint goal defined —') AS "Sprint Goal"
FROM sprints s WHERE s.id = $sprint::bigint

panels.description: Story points committed at sprint start (initial scope, from Jira sprint report).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0)), 0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'

panels.title: Committed

panels.description: SP added after sprint start. Target ≤ 10% of committed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add,i.story_points,0)),0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.was_in_initial_scope=FALSE AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'

panels.title: Unplanned

panels.description: All active SP (committed + unplanned – removed).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add,i.story_points,0)),0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'

panels.title: Total in Sprint

panels.description: SP with status Done.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add,i.story_points,0)),0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key JOIN sprints s ON s.id=si.sprint_id WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND i.status_category='Done' AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do' AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.resolved_at >= s.start_date AND i.resolved_at <= COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.end_date, NOW())

panels.title: Completed

panels.description: Completed / Committed SP. Target ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(delivery_pct::numeric,1),0) AS value FROM v_planning_deviation WHERE sprint_id=$sprint::bigint

panels.title: Delivery %

panels.description: Average delivered story points over the last 6 closed sprints for the same team. Provides context for current sprint commitment.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivered_points)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT pd.delivered_points
  FROM v_planning_deviation pd
  JOIN sprints s ON s.id = pd.sprint_id
  WHERE pd.state = 'closed'
    AND s.complete_date < (SELECT start_date FROM sprints WHERE id = $sprint::bigint)
    AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
         WHERE si.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
           AND i.project_key IN (SELECT DISTINCT i2.project_key FROM sprint_issues si2
             JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key WHERE si2.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE)
        ) * 2 > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si WHERE si.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE)
  ORDER BY s.complete_date DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 6
) last6

panels.title: Avg Velocity (Last 6 Sprints)

panels.description: Committed SP as % of average velocity (last 6 closed sprints). Green <80%, yellow 80–100%, red >100%.

targets.rawSql:
WITH committed AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0)), 0) AS sp
  FROM sprint_issues si
  JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint
    AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    AND si.removed_at IS NULL
    AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task')
    AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
),
avg_vel AS (
  SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivered_points)::numeric, 1) AS avg_sp
  FROM (
    SELECT pd.delivered_points
    FROM v_planning_deviation pd
    JOIN sprints s ON s.id = pd.sprint_id
    WHERE pd.state = 'closed'
      AND s.complete_date < (SELECT start_date FROM sprints WHERE id = $sprint::bigint)
      AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
           WHERE si.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id AND si.removed_at IS NULL
             AND i.project_key IN (SELECT DISTINCT i2.project_key FROM sprint_issues si2
               JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key WHERE si2.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si2.removed_at IS NULL)
          ) * 2 > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si WHERE si.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id AND si.removed_at IS NULL)
    ORDER BY s.complete_date DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 6
  ) last6
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * c.sp / NULLIF(a.avg_sp, 0), 1) AS value
FROM committed c CROSS JOIN avg_vel a

panels.title: Velocity Booked %

panels.description: Issues with SP estimated AND Epic linked.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND (i.story_points IS NOT NULL AND i.story_points > 0)
  AND i.epic_key IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Ready Issues

panels.description: Issues without a story point estimate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND (i.story_points IS NULL OR i.story_points = 0)

panels.title: Missing SP

panels.description: Issues not linked to a parent Epic.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.epic_key IS NULL

panels.title: Missing Epic Link

panels.description: % of Stories/Tasks that have SP + Epic. Target ≥ 90%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CASE WHEN total=0 THEN 0
  ELSE ROUND(100.0 * ready / total, 1)
END AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (i.story_points IS NOT NULL AND i.story_points>0) AND i.epic_key IS NOT NULL) AS ready,
    COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
  WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
) t

panels.title: Readiness %

panels.description: Stories/Tasks missing SP estimate or Epic link.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.issue_type AS "Type",
  i.assignee AS "Assignee",
  CASE WHEN i.story_points IS NULL OR i.story_points=0 THEN '❌' ELSE '✅' END AS "SP",
  CASE WHEN i.epic_key IS NOT NULL THEN '✅' ELSE '❌' END AS "Epic",
  COALESCE(i.epic_key,'—') AS "Epic Key"
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND ((i.story_points IS NULL OR i.story_points=0) OR i.epic_key IS NULL)
ORDER BY
  CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

panels.title: Issues Not Ready

panels.description: Issues added to the sprint after it started (unplanned scope).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND si.removed_at IS NULL

panels.title: Issues Added

panels.description: Story points added to sprint after start.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0)), 0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND si.removed_at IS NULL

panels.title: SP Added

panels.description: Issues removed from the sprint after it started (punted scope).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sprint_issues si WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Issues Removed

panels.description: Story points removed from sprint after start.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0)), 0) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: SP Removed

panels.description: (SP added + SP removed) ÷ Committed SP × 100. Target: ≤10%. High % indicates reactive planning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (  COALESCE((SELECT SUM(COALESCE(si2.story_points_at_add, i2.story_points, 0))     FROM sprint_issues si2 JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key     WHERE si2.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND si2.removed_at IS NULL), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(COALESCE(si3.story_points_at_add, i3.story_points, 0))     FROM sprint_issues si3 JOIN issues i3 ON i3.key = si3.issue_key     WHERE si3.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si3.removed_at IS NOT NULL), 0)) / NULLIF(  (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(si4.story_points_at_add, i4.story_points, 0))    FROM sprint_issues si4 JOIN issues i4 ON i4.key = si4.issue_key    WHERE si4.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si4.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE), 0), 1) AS value

panels.title: Scope Change %

panels.description: All issues added or removed after sprint start, with story points at time of change.

targets.rawSql: SELECT   i.key AS "Key",   i.summary AS "Summary",   i.issue_type AS "Type",   i.priority AS "Priority",   COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",   COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add::text, i.story_points::text, '—') AS "SP",   CASE     WHEN si.was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND si.removed_at IS NULL THEN 'Added'     WHEN si.removed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Removed'   END AS "Change",   i.status AS "Status" FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND (si.was_in_initial_scope = FALSE OR si.removed_at IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN si.removed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,   CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

panels.title: Scope Change Detail

panels.description: Committed, unplanned, removed and completed issue counts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)                                                    AS "Total",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE si.was_in_initial_scope=TRUE)        AS "Committed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE si.was_in_initial_scope=FALSE)       AS "Unplanned",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE si.removed_at IS NOT NULL)           AS "Removed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.status_category='Done') AS "Completed"
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint

panels.title: Summary

panels.description: All sprint issues sorted by status then priority. Removed issues last.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.issue_type AS "Type",
  i.priority AS "Priority",
  COALESCE(i.assignee,'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  i.status AS "Status",
  COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add::text, i.story_points::text,'—') AS "SP",
  COALESCE(i.epic_key,'—') AS "Epic",
  CASE WHEN si.was_in_initial_scope THEN 'Committed' ELSE 'Unplanned' END AS "Scope",
  CASE WHEN si.removed_at IS NOT NULL THEN '✕' ELSE '' END AS "Rmvd",
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT si2.sprint_id)
   FROM sprint_issues si2
   WHERE si2.issue_key = si.issue_key
     AND si2.sprint_id < $sprint::bigint
     AND si2.removed_at IS NULL) AS "Times Carried"
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN si.removed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 2 ELSE 1 END,
  CASE i.status_category WHEN 'Done' THEN 3 WHEN 'In Progress' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
  CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

panels.title: Issues

panels.description: Sprint issues (excl. Epics) confirmed to have a QASE test case linked.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic' AND i.has_qase_link = TRUE

panels.title: With QASE Link

panels.description: Sprint issues (excl. Epics) confirmed to have no QASE test case linked.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic' AND i.has_qase_link = FALSE

panels.title: Without QASE Link

panels.description: Percentage of checked sprint issues (excl. Epics) with a QASE test case.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link = TRUE) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic'

panels.title: QASE Coverage %

panels.description: Sprint issues where QASE status is pending next sync.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic' AND i.has_qase_link IS NULL

panels.title: Not Yet Checked

panels.description: Sprint issues (excl. Epics) confirmed to have no QASE test case, ordered by priority.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.issue_type AS "Type", i.priority AS "Priority", i.status AS "Status", COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", CASE WHEN si.was_in_initial_scope THEN 'Committed' ELSE 'Unplanned' END AS "Scope" FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic' AND i.has_qase_link = FALSE ORDER BY CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

panels.title: Issues Without QASE Link

panels.description: Sprint issues grouped by status showing QASE link coverage. Excludes Epics and removed issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.status AS "Status", COUNT(*) AS "Total (checked)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link = TRUE) AS "With QASE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link = FALSE) AS "Without QASE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NULL) AS "Not Checked", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link = TRUE) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS "Coverage %" FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL AND i.issue_type != 'Epic' GROUP BY i.status ORDER BY "Without QASE" DESC

panels.title: QASE Coverage by Issue Status

panels.description:
Remaining story points per day. Blue = actual remaining SP (issues transitioning to Done). Dashed green = ideal linear burndown.

Tip: use the time picker to zoom into the sprint's date range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_info AS (
    SELECT
        start_date,
        COALESCE(complete_date, end_date) AS end_date
    FROM sprints WHERE id = $sprint::bigint
),
committed AS (
    SELECT si.issue_key,
           COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0) AS sp
    FROM sprint_issues si
    JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
    WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint
      AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
),
total_sp AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sp), 0) AS total FROM committed
),
done_per_issue AS (
    SELECT c.issue_key, c.sp,
           MIN(t.transitioned_at) AS done_at
    FROM committed c
    JOIN issue_transitions t ON t.issue_key = c.issue_key
    WHERE UPPER(t.to_status) = 'DONE'
      AND t.transitioned_at >= (SELECT start_date FROM sprint_info)
    GROUP BY c.issue_key, c.sp
),
days AS (
    SELECT generate_series(
        DATE_TRUNC('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sprint_info)),
        DATE_TRUNC('day', (SELECT end_date FROM sprint_info) + INTERVAL '2 days'),
        '1 day'::interval
    ) AS day
)
SELECT
    d.day AS time,
    CASE WHEN d.day <= NOW()
        THEN (SELECT total FROM total_sp) - COALESCE((
            SELECT SUM(sp) FROM done_per_issue
            WHERE done_at < d.day + INTERVAL '1 day'
        ), 0)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "Remaining SP",
    GREATEST(0, ROUND(
        (SELECT total FROM total_sp) * (
            1 - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.day - (SELECT start_date FROM sprint_info)))
            / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
                (SELECT end_date FROM sprint_info) - (SELECT start_date FROM sprint_info)
            )), 0)
        )::numeric, 1
    )) AS "Ideal"
FROM days d
ORDER BY d.day

panels.title: Sprint Burndown

panels.description: Epics linked to issues in this sprint that have no Customer-Project value set.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.key AS "Key", e.summary AS "Summary",
  e.status AS "Status",
  COALESCE(e.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  COALESCE(e.customer, '—') AS "Customer",
  COALESCE(e.project_name, '—') AS "Project"
FROM issues e
WHERE e.issue_type = 'Epic'
  AND (e.customer_project IS NULL OR e.customer_project = '')
  AND e.key IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT i.epic_key
    FROM sprint_issues si
    JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
    WHERE si.sprint_id = $sprint::bigint
      AND i.epic_key IS NOT NULL
      AND si.removed_at IS NULL
  )
ORDER BY e.key

panels.title: Epics Missing Customer-Project
Obsolete / Won't Do
panels.description: Issues marked Obsolete or Won't Do — excluded from velocity and delivery calculations.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add,i.story_points,0)),0) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL
  AND i.status = 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'

panels.title: Planned
panels.description: Issues committed at sprint start (initial scope, excl. Epics, Sub-tasks, Bugs).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint
  AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task','Bug')

panels.title: Missing AC
panels.description: Stories/Tasks (excl. Bugs) without acceptance criteria.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key
WHERE si.sprint_id=$sprint::bigint AND si.removed_at IS NULL
  AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task','Bug')
  AND (i.has_acceptance_criteria IS NULL OR i.has_acceptance_criteria = FALSE)

list.label: Jira URL
list.name: jira_url
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.label: Quarter
list.name: quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC

list.label: Team / Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.label: Sprint
list.name: sprint
list.query: SELECT CONCAT(s.name, CASE WHEN s.state = 'active' THEN ' ★' ELSE '' END) AS __text, s.id::text AS __value FROM sprints s WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE si.sprint_id = s.id AND i.project_key IN ($project) AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE) * 2 > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si WHERE si.sprint_id = s.id AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE) ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.state = 'active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.start_date DESC NULLS LAST
